creator: mandree@FreeBSD.org
text:
Hi Doug,

portmaster --clean-packages-all still prompts me if I want the packages
removed - and is thus the same as --clean-packages.

I have installed devel/cvschk, built a package, deinstalled it.

Then I ran this in a Bourne shell - note that there are y/n prompts and
a "read answer" below:

$ sh -x $(which portmaster) --clean-packages-all 2>&1 \
| tee /tmp/portmaster.log

Note I deliberately ran this as user without privileges to keep the test
case. The behaviour is the same with "sudo" prefix.

This is /tmp/portmaster.log:

+ trap trap_exit INT
+ [ -z  ]
+ PM_PARENT_PID=50749
+ : /tmp
+ UPGRADE_TOOL=portmaster
+ PATH=/bin:/usr/bin:/sbin:/usr/sbin:/usr/local/bin:/usr/local/sbin
+ [ -e /usr/X11R6 -a ! -L /usr/X11R6 ]
+ [ -n  -a -z  ]
+ export PM_PARENT_PID TMPDIR UPGRADE_TOOL PATH
+ [ -r /etc/portmaster.rc ]
+ set -o allexport
+ [ -r /usr/local/etc/portmaster.rc ]
+ [ -r /home/ma/.portmasterrc ]
+ set +o allexport
+ set
+ my_environment=BLOCKSIZE=K
EDITOR=vim
ENV=/home/ma/.shrc
FTP_PASSIVE_MODE=YES
HOME=/home/ma
IFS=' 	
'
LOGNAME=ma

PM_PARENT_PID=50749
PPID=76233

SHELL=/usr/local/bin/bash

SSH_CLIENT='192.168.0.1 43737 22'
SSH_CONNECTION='192.168.0.1 43737 192.168.0.106 22'

TERMCAP='SC|screen|VT 100/ANSI X3.64 virtual terminal:\
	:DO=\E[%dB:LE=\E[%dD:RI=\E[%dC:UP=\E[%dA:bs:bt=\E[Z:\
	:cd=\E[J:ce=\E[K:cl=\E[H\E[J:cm=\E[%i%d;%dH:ct=\E[3g:\
	:do=^J:nd=\E[C:pt:rc=\E8:rs=\Ec:sc=\E7:st=\EH:up=\EM:\
	:le=^H:bl=^G:cr=^M:it#8:ho=\E[H:nw=\EE:ta=^I:is=\E)0:\
	:li#50:co#80:am:xn:xv:LP:sr=\EM:al=\E[L:AL=\E[%dL:\

	:ke=\E[?1l\E>:vi=\E[?25l:ve=\E[34h\E[?25h:vs=\E[34l:\
	:ti=\E[?1049h:te=\E[?1049l:us=\E[4m:ue=\E[24m:so=\E[3m:\
	:se=\E[23m:mb=\E[5m:md=\E[1m:mh=\E[2m:mr=\E[7m:\
	:me=\E[m:ms:\
	:Co#8:pa#64:AF=\E[3%dm:AB=\E[4%dm:op=\E[39;49m:AX:\
	:vb=\Eg:as=\E(0:ae=\E(B:\
	:ac=\140\140aaffggjjkkllmmnnooppqqrrssttuuvvwwxxyyzz{{||}}~~..--++,,hhII00:\
	:k0=\E[10~:k1=\EOP:k2=\EOQ:k3=\EOR:k4=\EOS:k5=\E[15~:\

	:F1=\E[23~:F2=\E[24~:kb=:K2=\E[G:kh=\E[1~:@1=\E[1~:\
	:kH=\E[4~:@7=\E[4~:kN=\E[6~:kP=\E[5~:kI=\E[2~:kD=\E[3~:\

TMPDIR=/tmp
UPGRADE_TOOL=portmaster
USER=ma
WINDOW=0
WRKDIRPREFIX=/tmp
_=/bin/sh
+ ps -o uid 50749
+ euid=  UID
 1001
+ euid=1001
+ [ 1001 -eq 0 ]
+ unset euid
+ umask 022
+ CLEAN_PACKAGES=clean_packages_all
+ ALL=cdp
+ unset var
+ [ -n  -a -n  ]
+ [ -n  -a -z  ]
+ [ 50749 -eq 50749 ]
+ [ -n  -o -n  ]

+ pd=/usr/ports
+ [ -z /usr/ports ]

+ [ -z  ]

+ pdb=/var/db/pkg
+ [ -z /var/db/pkg ]

+ [ -z  -a  != only -a -z  -a -z  -a -z  ]
+ pm_make_b -f/usr/share/mk/bsd.port.mk -V DISTDIR
+ DISTDIR=/usr/ports/distfiles
+ [ -n /usr/ports/distfiles ]
+ DISTDIR=/usr/ports/distfiles/
+ export DISTDIR
+ [ -z  -a -d /var/db/ports ]
+ port_dbdir=/var/db/ports
+ [ -z /var/db/ports ]
+ [ -n /var/db/ports ]
+ export port_dbdir
+ [ -n  -o -n  ]
+ set --
+ unset var newopts
+ [ -n  ]
+ [ -n clean_packages_all ]
+ init_packages_var
+ [ -n  ]
+ pm_make -f/usr/share/mk/bsd.port.mk -V PACKAGES
+ PACKAGES=/usr/ports/packages
+ [ -z /usr/ports/packages ]
+ export PACKAGES
+ echo ===>>> Checking for stale packages
===>>> Checking for stale packages
+ echo 

+ find /usr/ports/packages -type f
+ sort
+ pkg_dir=cvschk-1.12.tbz
+ pkg_dir=cvschk-1.12
+ [ ! -d /var/db/pkg/cvschk-1.12 ]
+ echo ===>>> cvschk-1.12.tbz is not currently installed
===>>> cvschk-1.12.tbz is not currently installed
+ echo -n 	===>>> Delete? y/n [y] 
	===>>> Delete? y/n [y] + read answer
+ echo 	===>>> Deleting /usr/ports/packages/All/cvschk-1.12.tbz
	===>>> Deleting /usr/ports/packages/All/cvschk-1.12.tbz
+ pm_unlink_s /usr/ports/packages/All/cvschk-1.12.tbz
+ /bin/test -e /usr/ports/packages/All/cvschk-1.12.tbz
+ /bin/unlink /usr/ports/packages/All/cvschk-1.12.tbz
unlink: /usr/ports/packages/All/cvschk-1.12.tbz: Permission denied
+ continue
+ echo 

+ echo ===>>> Deleting stale symlinks
===>>> Deleting stale symlinks
+ pm_cd /usr/ports/packages
+ builtin cd /usr/ports/packages
+ sort+ find . -type l

+ [ ! -e ./Latest/cvschk.tbz ]
+ [ ! -e ./devel/cvschk-1.12.tbz ]
+ echo 

+ + findsort . -type
 d -empty -print
+ empty_dirs=
+ [ -n  ]
+ echo ===>>> No empty directories in /usr/ports/packages
===>>> No empty directories in /usr/ports/packages
+ safe_exit
+ [ 50749 -eq 50749 ]
+ parent_exit
+ local files f DISCARD show_list
+ [ -s  ]
+ [ -n  -a -z  ]
+ [ -z  ]
+ [ -n  -o -n  ]
+ [ -z  -a -z  -a -n  ]
+ [ -n  ]
+ [ -d  ]
+ pm_unlink /tmp/f-50749-*
+ /bin/test -e /tmp/f-50749-*
+ [ -n  ]
+ [ -n  ]
+ exit 0
